framework: UNESCO AI Competency Framework for Teachers (AI-CFT) 2024

LO3.1.3.note: WS3 own-threshold used the wrong variable; operating the rule with correct parameters is unverified.

LO3.2.3.note: WS_DT F_Q2 explains overfitting as a train/test gap.

LO3.3.1.note: F_Q2 is a strong limitation-awareness signal, but E_Q4 (perfect classification impossible) was not answered and Sections A-D need re-extraction.

ai_cft_proposal.rationale: Acquire and Deepen learning outcomes are achieved across multiple worksheets with reliable extraction. Create (LO3.3.1) is only emerging.

decision_note: The system proposes a level from aggregated LO evidence. The researcher makes the final holistic judgement. Levels are not assigned from any single worksheet.

data_gaps.why: Core data-driven Deepen items; also decide whether Create is reached.
Application of the systematic algorithm unverified.
Direct cognitive items for LO3.1.1 / LO3.1.5.
Reading a given tree is a separate competency from writing one.
